footer_tagline: Holistic wellness rooted in balance, intention, and lasting well-being.
home_hero_img_alt: Hummingbird in flight against a moody sky
home_hero_subtitle: Bilingual therapy for adults navigating insomnia, trauma, anxiety, stress, and life between cultures. Sessions in English and Spanish.
home_services_heading: You don't have to figure this out alone.
home_services_subtitle: Whether you can't sleep, feel stuck, or are running on empty, support is here. Sessions in English and Spanish.
home_sleep_aria: Learn more about Sleep & Insomnia therapy
home_sleep_desc: You lie in bed exhausted but can't fall asleep. Or you wake up at 3am and your mind won't stop. You're tired all day, then wired at night. This cycle is real, and it can change.
home_trauma_desc: Something happened, and part of you never fully moved on. You might feel on edge, shut down, or both. Certain things bring it back without warning. You don't have to keep carrying it alone.
home_cae_aria: Learn more about Childhood Adverse Experiences therapy
home_cae_desc: You grew up faster than you should have. Or learned that love came with conditions. What happened then still shows up now in ways that are hard to explain. Understanding that connection can change everything.
home_stress_aria: Learn more about Stress Management therapy
home_stress_desc: You are always in go mode. Your list never ends. You feel tired but can't slow down. Your body keeps sending signals you keep ignoring. Learning to manage stress is not about doing less. It is about feeling better.
home_values_heading: You belong here, exactly as you are.
home_values_p1: At Grey Wellness, we believe every person deserves care that sees them fully. This is a space rooted in dignity and respect, regardless of immigration status, national origin, religion, race, ethnicity, sexual orientation, gender identity, gender expression, disability, body size, or any of the other beautiful, complex things that make us human.
home_values_p2: Grey Wellness was founded by Mónica Grey, a licensed therapist, an immigrant, a woman, and a woman of color. Her path to this work was shaped by knowing firsthand what it feels like to navigate systems that were not always designed with you in mind, and still needing to heal, to rest, to feel whole.
home_values_p3: That lived experience is not incidental to this practice. It is the foundation of it.
home_values_p4: We stand against misogyny, racism, colorism, sexism, ableism, machismo, classism, elitism, xenophobia, antisemitism, Islamophobia, homophobia, transphobia, and any other system that reduces a person's humanity to a category.
home_values_p5: If you've ever wondered whether there is a therapy space that is truly safe for someone like you, we want you to know: this one is.
home_cta_subtitle: Curiosity, exhaustion, courage, or maybe all three. Whatever it was, we're glad you're here. You don't have to have it all figured out to reach out.
home_schema_cbti_desc: Gold-standard, evidence-based treatment to retrain your mind and body for deeper, more restorative sleep—often in 6–8 weeks.
home_schema_anxiety_desc: Therapy for adults whose anxiety, trauma, or stress is making sleep harder.
